title: Private Handoff Cue
description: Live v1 private handoff cue contract for moving live public interactions into Messenger/private handling when private data or order flow is needed.
$comment: Sources: PACK-08, TECH-08, PACK-06, and PACK-05. Live must not close orders publicly or collect private information in public comments.

source_comment_id.description: Public live comment triggering private handoff.

public_safe.description: Whether cue is safe for public live channel.

no_public_order_closing.description: Invariant: live cue must not close orders publicly.
